intro: Precision in flight. Power in combat.
description:
Air Combat, Flight Simulator, Alien War

Enter a high-speed air combat flight simulator where alien forces have taken control of Earth’s skies. Become an elite pilot and engage in intense jet fighter dogfights, defending humanity in action-packed aerial battles.

Experience fast-paced aircraft combat gameplay with advanced controls, multiple weapons, and dynamic enemy AI. Track targets, evade incoming attacks, and dominate the battlefield in high-risk missions across diverse environments.

Upgrade your jet with powerful systems and alien technology. Improve speed, defense, and firepower to gain an advantage in large-scale aerial warfare scenarios.

Key Features:
Air Combat Simulator: Real-time jet fighter battles and dogfights
Flight Simulator Gameplay: Precision controls and advanced maneuvers
Alien Invasion War: Fight against evolving enemy fleets
Aircraft Upgrade System: Boost speed, armor, and weapons
Mission Variety: Escort, defense, and large-scale combat
Open Sky Environments: Cities, mountains, deserts, and more

Take off, engage, and survive in a high-intensity airplane combat simulator where every mission tests your skill.
